message:
perf(renderer): reuse BufferDiff allocation between frames

Add compute_into() method to BufferDiff for allocation-free diffing
when a pre-allocated struct is available. The Renderer now caches
a BufferDiff instance and reuses it every frame.

Benchmark results (render_cycle/full_cycle_with_ansi_80x24):
  Before: 28.4µs
  After:  24.7µs
  Improvement: 13% faster

## Isomorphism Proof
- Ordering preserved: yes - same cell iteration order
- Tie-breaking unchanged: yes - same region merge logic
- Floating-point: N/A
- RNG seeds: N/A
- Golden outputs: all 181 renderer tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
